name: Geauga Lake
city: Bainbridge Township and Aurora, Ohio, United States
owner:
Funtime, Inc. (1969–1995)
Premier Parks/Six Flags (1995–2003)
Cedar Fair (2004–2007)
description: Geauga Lake was an amusement park in Bainbridge Township and Aurora, Ohio.  It was established in 1887, in what had been a local recreation area adjacent to a lake of the same name.  The first amusement ride was added in 1889, and the park's first roller coaster – the Big Dipper – was built in 1925.
